_publications._publicationTitle: Validity and interexaminer reliability of a new method to quantify skin neurofibromas of neurofibromatosis 1 using paper frames.

_contextSnippet: There was a statistically significant correlation (P <0.0001) between the average values...using the equation 65.6 + 9.7× for examiner A (R² = 0.63) and the equation 38.6 + 10.3× for examiner B (R² = 0.64)
details: Strong correlation (P <0.0001) with total neurofibroma count, with R² = 0.63 for examiner A and R² = 0.64 for examiner B
